steps: mark selected brigade as withdrawal rear guard
verify battle log and battle unit card reflect rear-guard plan

deploymentUi: Deployment ledger showed withdrawal rear guard count 0/3 before assignment.
Planner action button showed 撤退後衛にする.
After assignment, selected brigade card gained rear-guard-planned styling and the button changed to 後衛指定を解除.
The campaign message displayed 出撃戦線を戦区標準、予備運用を標準予備、指定予備0旅団、撤退後衛1旅団に調整した。
battle: Battle log included 撤退後衛計画: 1旅団を離脱援護に指定。
Selected 第1戦列歩兵大隊 started on 後方砲兵線 with posture 後退守備, target priority 敵指揮, ammo policy 弾薬節約, and reserve readiness 81.
afterAction: After immediate withdrawal, After Action showed 撤退後衛.
Summary showed 後衛3部隊が追撃被害39相当を抑止。追撃圧18。
The planned 第1戦列歩兵大隊 appeared as 後衛援護 / 追撃被害12抑止.
Per-unit result included 撤退後衛 後衛援護 / 追撃被害12抑止 / 後衛援護 / 即応81 / 弾薬93 / 士気85.
campaignCarryover: Applying result returned to Army Camp.
Last message carried 後衛3部隊が追撃被害39相当を抑止。追撃圧18。
Unit history contained 撤退後衛 and 追撃被害12抑止.
Visible save version was 保存 v8.
